subject: Read-only support: P8 operator value
body: Assignment from Pearly Drifting Jetty. Take a read-only support lane for Arboreal's P8 Slice A. No edits, no claim, no git activity unless you first ask and I reroute. Inspect cost-of-collaboration P8-A4, snapshot/text tests, and current TUI snapshot model. Reply to Arboreal and me with a concise READINESS note: the minimum value signals that prove human situational awareness, likely edge cases, and any test-shape risks. Treat this as support, not a blocker unless you find a clear correctness issue.
